title: elaphoglossum zosteriformis
intro: Elaphoglossum zosteriformis, also known as the chain fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum zosteriformis include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
